summary: Update /todo-implement skill: PR-and-stop is default; local merge is a documented opt-out
description:
After child 1 ships 'todo pr', rewrite step 8 of skills/todo-implement/
SKILL.md to make PR-and-stop the default flow:

OLD step 8:
  git checkout main
  git merge --no-ff todo/<id>
  git branch -d todo/<id>

NEW step 8 (default):
  todo pr   # pushes branch, opens PR, prints URL

NEW step 8 alt (documented as 'when main isn't protected and you're
working solo'):
  git checkout main
  git merge --no-ff todo/<id>
  git branch -d todo/<id>
  git push

Also update skills/README.md 'Closure Ceremony' section if it mentions
the merge step.

Done contract: skill file shows the PR flow first with the local-merge
flow clearly labeled as a fallback. README parity.

Depends on: <c1> (the todo pr command must exist before the skill
references it).
